film.title: Masoom
film.overview: A loving husband and father's joyful family life is rocked to its core upon the discovery that he has a young son borne from a past extramarital affair.

dialogues.dialogue: Just because he is not your child?! Let the one who has sinned take care of him! Why bother me?! Aren't you ashamed of speaking so?! I have not been as shameless as you! Are you ashamed?! So what should I do?!

Let the one who has sinned take care of him! Why bother me?! Aren't you ashamed of speaking so?! I have not been as shameless as you! Are you ashamed?! So what should I do?! Tell me, what should I do?!

I asked, where did you go?! I am asking you something! Where did you go?! Aren't you ashamed?! You are a guest at somebody's house! We're doing so much for you! Instead of being grateful, this is what you do!
